creator: rene@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 214792
remove dependency on expired gnatdroid-armv7, make NDK unconditional

This patch attempts to remove the dependency of fb-adb on the expired gnatdroid-armv7. It does not patch yet for some reason, likely because I tried to make the NDK option unconditional (since switching it off no longer made sense).

The Makefile has been simplified and restructured a lot.
